idea_title: Uncertainty-calibrated pseudo-label acceptance under label noise

selected_idea.title: Uncertainty-calibrated pseudo-label acceptance under label noise
selected_idea.pitch: The evidence repeatedly studies uncertainty-aware semi-supervised medical imaging, but the selection rule for accepting pseudo-labels under noisy labeled seeds is still under-tested. A local proxy can test whether entropy, margin, and agreement filters reduce noisy pseudo-label promotion compared with naive confidence thresholding.
selected_idea.mechanism: Entropy-filtered, class-balanced pseudo-label selection will improve held-out classification accuracy over naive confidence pseudo-labeling when the initial labeled set contains injected label noise.
selected_idea.testable_hypothesis: Entropy-filtered, class-balanced pseudo-label selection will improve held-out classification accuracy over naive confidence pseudo-labeling when the initial labeled set contains injected label noise.
selected_idea.baseline_to_beat: [EV001] Pseudo-D: Informing Multi-View Uncertainty Estimation with Calibrated Neural Training Dynamics

topic: uncertainty-aware pseudo-label selection for semi-supervised medical image classification under label noise
label: Probe
hypothesis: Entropy-filtered, class-balanced pseudo-label selection will improve held-out classification accuracy over naive confidence pseudo-labeling when the initial labeled set contains injected label noise.
method: Entropy-filtered, class-balanced pseudo-label selection will improve held-out classification accuracy over naive confidence pseudo-labeling when the initial labeled set contains injected label noise.
baseline: [EV001] Pseudo-D: Informing Multi-View Uncertainty Estimation with Calibrated Neural Training Dynamics
expected_result: The proposed method (Uncertainty-calibrated pseudo-label acceptance under label noise) should beat the baseline on the specified metric.
failure_interpretation: A weak or negative margin means the mechanism does not justify promotion and should be revised or killed.
